name: SCC_CreateCM_Start_Atten_Char_Ind
title: SCC_CreateCM_Start_Atten_Char_Ind
syntax: void SCC_CreateCM_Start_Atten_Char_Ind ( byte RunId[], byte SourceMac[], byte TargetMac[], dword NumSounds, dword TimeOut, byte ForwardingSTA[] )
description: Creates a CM_Start_Atten_Char.Ind message for sending.

parameters.name: RunId
parameters.description: Random Run Identifier of sender (8 byte).

parameters.name: SourceMac
parameters.description: Source address of the Ethernet frame.

parameters.name: TargetMac
parameters.description: Destination address of the Ethernet frame.

parameters.name: NumSounds
parameters.description: Number of M-Sounds transmitted during the SLAC process.

parameters.name: TimeOut
parameters.description: Timeout for transmission of M-Sounds in multiples of 100ms.

parameters.name: ForwardingSTA
parameters.description: MAC address where the measurement results shall be sent to.
SecurityType dword 0x00 = No Security 0x01 = Public Key Signature 0x02-0xFF = Reserved
RespType dword 0x00 = HLE of the STA 0x01 = Another GP STA 0x02-0xFF = Reserved

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
